result.stdout:
Remove unnecessary files and folders.

Usage: dotnet-clear [options]

Options:
  -s|--start-path <START_PATH>  Starting folder. (Default is current folder)
  -c|--confirm-yes              Insist that you understand that file/folders will be deleted without undo-able. 
  -?|-h|--help                  Show help information

Sample:
  dotnet clear                  // just display folders to be removed and how much space you can saved.
  dotnet clear -c               // confirmed to delete displayed folders.
  dotnet clear -s ..\b          // set start path to ..\b

commands.payload:
Remove unnecessary files and folders.

Usage: dotnet-clear [options]

Options:
  -s|--start-path <START_PATH>  Starting folder. (Default is current folder)
  -c|--confirm-yes              Insist that you understand that file/folders will be deleted without undo-able. 
  -?|-h|--help                  Show help information

Sample:
  dotnet clear                  // just display folders to be removed and how much space you can saved.
  dotnet clear -c               // confirmed to delete displayed folders.
  dotnet clear -s ..\b          // set start path to ..\b

options.description: Insist that you understand that file/folders will be deleted without undo-able.
